森.mnemonic: One tree is 木, two make 林, and three crowd the page into a forest.
森.the_kotsu: 森 is what happens when 林 gets one more tree and turns dense.

明.mnemonic: Sun plus moon is the most literal lighting rig in kanji.
明.the_kotsu: 明 is brightness made from the two big lights: sun and moon.

林.mnemonic: Two trees side by side are not a forest yet, just a grove getting started.
林.the_kotsu: 林 is the small woods: two 木 standing together.
